create_submarine.command.no_sublevel_con: 当前维度中未找到子场景容器。
create_submarine.command.queue_submarine: 已排队生成 %s 根长度为 %s 的潜艇藤蔓，将从你的位置开始逐步蔓延生成
create_submarine.command.spawn_liana_suc: 成功生成一根长度为 %s 的潜艇藤蔓
create_submarine.configuration.ballastFo: Multiplier on the vertical force ballast tanks apply. Lower = slower dive/ascend, higher = snappier.
create_submarine.configuration.ballastTr: Multiplier on the ballast vent fill/drain transfer rate. Lower = slower filling/emptying, higher = faster.
create_submarine.configuration.client.to: 用户界面和渲染的客户端设置。
create_submarine.configuration.deeperOce: How many blocks deeper to push the ocean floor when Deeper Oceans is on. WARNING: large values generate and render far more terrain and can badly hurt performance. Raise it carefully. Default 10.
create_submarine.configuration.disableIm: Disable all hull implosion damage from water pressure.
create_submarine.configuration.disableSt: 禁用所有 Deep Seas 的启动用户界面屏幕（欢迎屏幕和更新通知）。强烈建议如果您正在制作整合包，请将此设置为 TRUE。
create_submarine.configuration.enableDee: Deepen the ocean floor below vanilla. Off = vanilla ocean depth. Set the amount with Deeper Oceans Depth.
create_submarine.configuration.enablePer: Enable the experimental Permanent Water Culling test for submarines and boats.
create_submarine.configuration.globalMax: Cap applied to maxWaterDepth of all non Create Deep Seas blocks. Per-block values are stored in config/submarine_hull.json.
create_submarine.configuration.ignoredUp: 内部：存储用户关闭的最后更新通知的版本字符串。
create_submarine.configuration.implosion: Multiplier on every block's implosion chance at runtime. Lower = slower cracking, higher = faster cracking.
create_submarine.configuration.maxDepthM: Multiplier on every block's effective maxWaterDepth at runtime. Lower = more fragile hulls, higher = tougher hulls.
create_submarine.configuration.pulleyMax: Maximum sliding speed of a pulley along a steel cable (blocks/s). Above this speed the pulley starts overheating.
create_submarine.configuration.title: Create Deep Seas
create_submarine.configuration.waterThru: Multiplier on water thruster thrust output. Lower = weaker propulsion, higher = stronger.
create_submarine.configuration.welcomeSc: 内部：一旦深海欢迎屏幕被确认，设置为 true。设置回 false 以在下一个主菜单上再次显示欢迎屏幕。
create_submarine.ponder.ballast_vent.tex: 排口需要旋转力才能工作。
它必须通过管道连接到压载水罐。
接入动力并连接完成后，它会管理压载压力。
排口必须至少有一个面接触海水。
反转旋转方向可切换为排水模式，将水排出！
create_submarine.ponder.electrolyzer.tex: 电解器需要水来生产氧气。
它需要 Forge 能量（FE）供能。
水会被转化为氧气，并输送到你的潜艇中！
You have the choice between Create Crafts & Additions, Create New Age, and Create Power Grid to provide electricity.
氧气扩散器需要电解器生成的氧气。
它会根据潜艇大小按比例消耗氧气。
提供红石信号以激活氧气扩散器。
create_submarine.ponder.poulis.text_1:
Pinch the cable between
two Pulleys facing each other
to attach a sublevel to it.
create_submarine.ponder.poulis.text_2:
The sublevel will then
follow the cable wherever it goes.
create_submarine.ponder.steel_cable.head: Steel Cable
create_submarine.ponder.steel_cable.text:
Entities can walk on
a taut steel cable.
create_submarine.ponder.steel_cable_elec:
With an electricity mod such as
Create: Addition, supply FE
directly to the Rope Winch
holding the cable to electrify it.
create_submarine.ponder.water_thruster.t: 喷水推进器使用加压水流产生推力。
将它连接到水源并提供动能即可激活。
压力越高、转速越快，推进速度就越快！
这个水罐会为推进提供所需的水。
create_submarine.ui.text.select_block_ti: 选择一个方块以编辑其属性
create_submarine.update.message: 机械动力：深海有新版本可用：v%s！在 %s 下载。
create_submarine.update.message_screen: 机械动力：深海有新版本可用：v%s
create_submarine.update.title: 机械动力：深海 更新
create_submarine.welcome.message: It's strongly recommended to set up your Deep Seas preferences before you dive in — hull strength, propulsion, ocean depth and more can all be tuned to your liking.
create_submarine.welcome.title: Welcome to Create Deep Seas
item.create_submarine.ballast_tank.toolt:
佩戴工程师护目镜时
可以查看容量。

使潜艇能够浮起，
可通过
item.create_submarine.creative_oxygenato:
自动管理氧气
和排水。

当潜艇气密时
移除舱内积水。
item.create_submarine.floater.tooltip.su:
Allows a boat to float
on the water surface.
item.create_submarine.pressurizer.toolti:
Allows submarines to have
pressure-resistant windows.
